text:
AI-Driven Multi-Document Correlation for Enterprise Financial Compliance and Fraud Detection
A framework for cross-document fraud detection through relational intelligence, evaluated across 3 million anonymized records and four jurisdictions.
By Varsha Shah, Enterprise Technical Architect, USA
